entries.reason: Single Responsibility — すべて metrics の日付軸を `finalizedAt` に統一する同一関心に収束している; Unambiguous Requirements — 日時形式・書き込みタイミング・欠損時挙動などが具体的で検証可能; Complete Context — 多くの要件が「When/If + shall」の条件-結果ペアとして明示されていない; No Hardcoded Secrets — APIキーやトークン等の秘匿情報は記載されていない; Prioritize Requirements — 要件が3件超あるが優先順位（P1/P2等）が示されていない; Impact on Existing Features — 既存機能への影響が対象ごとに明示され、無効化挙動まで記述されている; Present Recommendations with Reasoning — Q&Aで各質問に推奨案と根拠が一貫して先頭提示されていない; Explore Before Asking — docs/やコード調査済みである根拠がなく、確認質問先行に見える; Proactively Raise Related Implications — cache無効化・backfill初回影響・将来流用など関連含意を先回りして記載している; Confirm Brainstorm vs. Decision Before Critiquing — 代替案の却下時に「検討中か最終判断か」の明示確認がない; Capture Digressions in draft.md — 脱線した議論の痕跡がなく本条項は実質的に非該当; Draft Stays at Requirements Level — ファイルパス、スクリプト配置、テスト本数、`git log` コマンド等の実装詳細を含む; Backward — Compatible CLI Interface — 既存コマンド/オプションの削除や意味変更は示されておらず移行計画要件は非該当

Single Responsibility — 変更は「metrics 日付軸を finalizedAt 基準へ移行」という単一関心に収まっている; Unambiguous Requirements — 各要件は条件と期待動作が具体的で、検証可能な記述になっている; Complete Context — R1〜R8 が When/If と shall の組で記述され、文脈と結果が揃っている; No Hardcoded Secrets — 仕様文書のみで秘密情報やハードコードされた認証情報は含まれていない; Prioritize Requirements — 4件超の要件が P1/P2/P3 で優先度付けされている; Impact on Existing Features — 「既存機能への影響」節で affected 領域ごとの影響が明示されている; Present Recommendations with Reasoning — Q1〜Q4 で各推奨案と根拠が簡潔に提示されている; Explore Before Asking — 「調査済み事項」に事前のコード・テスト探索が明記され、Open Questions もなし; Proactively Raise Related Implications — キャッシュ無効化、backfill、テスト影響、将来拡張まで関連含意を先回りして記載している; Confirm Brainstorm vs. Decision Before Critiquing — 「brainstorming ではなく decision」と明示し、確定事項として扱っている; Capture Digressions in draft.md — 脱線議論は見当たらず、この観点は実質的に非該当; Draft Stays at Requirements Level — `src/...` の具体パスや `git first-parent` など実装寄り詳細が含まれている; Backward — Compatible CLI Interface — 既存コマンド/オプションの削除や意味変更はなく、移行計画要件は非該当

Single Responsibility — All changes center on one concern: shifting metrics date-axis semantics to `state.finalizedAt` and related migration/cache behavior.; Unambiguous Requirements — Requirements are stated with concrete, verifiable conditions and data fields rather than vague adjectives.; Complete Context — Each requirement includes a trigger (`When`/`If`) and an expected behavior (`shall`).; No Hardcoded Secrets — No secrets (API keys/passwords/tokens) are present; this spec is design-level content.; No Silent Error Swallowing — Error handling code is not specified here, so the article is inapplicable at this spec text level.; Prioritize Requirements — Requirements are explicitly prioritized as `P1`, `P2`, and `P3`.; Impact on Existing Features — The spec does not explicitly list impacts on existing features or explicitly state “no impact.”; Bounded Resource Usage — Backfill targets “existing all specs” without an explicit upper bound on count/size/time.; Changes Require Test Coverage — The spec includes test updates and new unit tests covering core requirements.; Spec Includes Test Strategy — A dedicated Test Strategy section defines what to test and how.; Synthesize Draft, Do Not Copy — No source draft text is provided for comparison, so this check is inapplicable.; Record Unresolved Points as Open Questions — Open Questions section exists and explicitly states none unresolved.; Include 'Why This Approach' Rationale — A dedicated rationale section explains why this approach was chosen.; Backward — Compatible CLI Interface — Behavior change is accompanied by an explicit migration path (one-time backfill and cache invalidation approach).; Exit Code Contract — The spec does not define non-zero exit-code behavior for command failures.

R1 finalize成功時に`state.finalizedAt`を書き込む — `run-finalize`のcommit処理で`saveFinalizedAt(..., new Date().toISOString())`を実行して`flow.json`へ保存している; R2 metrics tokenの日付軸を`state.finalizedAt`に切り替える — `mtime`参照を削除し、行生成時に`parsed.state.finalizedAt`から日付を算出している; R3 `state.finalizedAt`欠損specのスキップ＋警告 — 欠損時にstderrへ警告を出して`continue`し、集計から除外している; R4 キャッシュ有効性を`maxFinalizedAt`比較で判定 — 現在の`maxFinalizedAt`を計算し、キャッシュ内`maxFinalizedAt`との比較でfresh判定している; R5 `maxFinalizedAt`欠如キャッシュを無効化 — キャッシュJSONに`maxFinalizedAt`が文字列で無い場合は`false`を返して再計算させている; R6 本spec finalize時に既存全specへ一度だけbackfill実行 — diffは任意の`finalize-migration.js`実行フック追加のみで、全spec対象・一度きり実行の実装が確認できない; R7 backfillでmerge日時優先＋初回追加日時フォールバック — git履歴解決（merge優先/初回追加フォールバック）ロジックがdiff内に存在しない; R8 既存metrics fixtureの`state.finalizedAt`更新 — `tests/e2e/metrics/token.test.js`の既存fixtureに`state.finalizedAt`が追加されている

R1 flow finalize writes `state.finalizedAt` on success — `run-finalize` now calls `saveFinalizedAt(..., new Date().toISOString())` before commit, and write failures throw.; R2 metrics token uses `state.finalizedAt` instead of flow.json mtime — date derivation switched to `parsed.state.finalizedAt` and mtime-based axis logic was removed.; R3 specs missing `state.finalizedAt` are skipped with warning — `buildRows` now `continue`s on missing value and emits a stderr warning per skipped flow.; R4 cache validity is based on `maxFinalizedAt` comparison — current max finalized timestamp is computed and compared against cached `maxFinalizedAt`.; R5 cache without `maxFinalizedAt` is invalidated — cache is treated as stale when `parsed.maxFinalizedAt` is absent/non-string, forcing recompute.; R6 backfill runs exactly once during this spec finalize — migration hook runs whenever this spec’s finalize executes, with no explicit one-time execution guard.; R7 backfill prioritizes merge timestamp with first — added fallback — migration script resolves first-parent merge date first, then falls back to `--diff-filter=A` initial add date.; R8 existing metrics fixtures are updated in — scope — existing metrics fixture flows in `tests/e2e/metrics/token.test.js` were updated to include `state.finalizedAt`.

R1 flow finalize writes `state.finalizedAt` on successful completion — `run-finalize` now calls `saveFinalizedAt(..., new Date().toISOString())` before commit.; R2 metrics token uses `state.finalizedAt` (not flow.json mtime) as date axis — mtime-based logic was removed and rows now derive date from `parsed.state.finalizedAt`.; R3 specs missing `state.finalizedAt` are skipped with warning — `buildRows` emits stderr warning and `continue`s when finalizedAt is absent/invalid.; R4 cache validity compares cached `maxFinalizedAt` vs current max finalized timestamp — `computeMaxFinalizedAt` + `isCacheFresh` implement this comparison.; R5 cache without `maxFinalizedAt` is invalidated and recomputed — freshness check returns false when cached `maxFinalizedAt` is missing/non-string.; R6 backfill runs only once during this spec finalize — finalize always invokes `finalize-migration.js` when present; no explicit one-time execution marker/guard at hook level.; R7 backfill prioritizes merge timestamp with first — added fallback — script resolves `git log --first-parent main` first, then falls back to `git log --diff-filter=A` on `spec.md`.; R8 existing metrics fixtures are updated in scope for `state.finalizedAt` — existing `tests/e2e/metrics/token.test.js` fixtures were updated and dedicated finalizedAt tests were added.

R1 flow finalize writes `state.finalizedAt` (ISO 8601 UTC) on success — `run-finalize` now calls `saveFinalizedAt(..., new Date().toISOString())` before commit, and `saveFinalizedAt` persists to `flow.json`.; R2 metrics token uses `state.finalizedAt` as date axis instead of mtime — mtime-based collection was removed and row dates are derived from `parsed.state.finalizedAt`.; R3 specs missing `state.finalizedAt` are skipped with warning — `buildRows` emits a stderr warning and `continue`s when finalizedAt is missing/invalid.; R4 cache validity compares cached/current max finalized timestamp — `computeMaxFinalizedAt` and `isCacheFresh` compare cache `maxFinalizedAt` against current maximum.; R5 cache without `maxFinalizedAt` is invalidated — `isCacheFresh` returns false when cached `maxFinalizedAt` is absent or non-string, forcing recomputation.; R6 backfill runs once during this spec’s finalize — finalize hook runs spec-local `scripts/finalize-migration.js`, and the script is idempotent with an early no-op guard after backfill.; R7 backfill prefers main — branch merge time with first-added fallback — migration script uses `git log --first-parent main` first, then falls back to `git log --diff-filter=A` on `spec.md`.; R8 existing metrics fixtures were updated in scope — existing `tests/e2e/metrics/token.test.js` fixtures were updated to include `state.finalizedAt` (plus new finalizedAt-focused tests).; No Hardcoded Secrets — No API keys, passwords, tokens, or similar secrets are present in the provided spec/diff content.; No Silent Error Swallowing — Multiple `catch` blocks silently return defaults (e.g., `return ""` / `return false`) without logging or re-throwing.; Bounded Resource Usage — Backfill scans and processes all `specs/*/flow.json` without an explicit hard upper bound in the migration script.; No Sensitive Data in Logs — Log messages contain file paths/status only, with no passwords, tokens, or clear PII.; No Disabling Existing Tests — Existing tests were updated and new tests added; no skips/comments/deletions to force pass are shown.; Escalate When New Tests Break Existing Tests — Inapplicable: no evidence here that newly added tests caused existing tests to fail.; Do Not Modify Existing Tests Without Approval — Existing fixture updates are explicitly user-approved in the spec Q&A/User Confirmation.; Flag Tests That Become Irrelevant — Inapplicable: no tests are shown as obsolete/irrelevant due to this change.; Exit Code Contract — Failure paths explicitly use non-zero exits (`process.exit(1)` / `assertOk`), while documented skip behavior remains intentional success.; No Synchronous I/O in Hot Paths — `readFileSync`/`writeFileSync` are used inside per-spec processing loops in `finalize-migration.js`.; Validate User Input at Entry Point — Inapplicable in shown changes: no new CLI/stdin entry-point input handling paths were introduced.

R1 flow finalize writes `state.finalizedAt` (ISO 8601 UTC) on success — `run-finalize` calls `saveFinalizedAt(..., new Date().toISOString())`, and `saveFinalizedAt` validates/writes `flow.json`.; R2 metrics token uses `state.finalizedAt` instead of `flow.json` mtime — mtime-based date logic was removed and date rows are derived from `parsed.state.finalizedAt`.; R3 specs missing `state.finalizedAt` are skipped with warning — `buildRows` emits a stderr warning and `continue`s when finalizedAt is missing/invalid.; R4 cache validity uses `maxFinalizedAt` comparison — current max finalized timestamp is computed and compared against cached `maxFinalizedAt` in `isCacheFresh`.; R5 cache without `maxFinalizedAt` is invalidated — freshness check returns false when cached `maxFinalizedAt` is absent/non-string, forcing recompute.; R6 this spec finalize triggers one — shot backfill for existing specs — finalize hook runs spec-local `scripts/finalize-migration.js`, and the script is idempotent with an all-backfilled early exit.; R7 backfill prefers merge timestamp with first — added fallback — migration resolves `git log --first-parent main` first, then falls back to `git log --diff-filter=A` on `spec.md`.; R8 existing metrics fixtures are updated in — scope for `state.finalizedAt` — existing fixtures in `tests/e2e/metrics/token.test.js` were updated and finalizedAt-focused tests were added.; No Hardcoded Secrets — 追加・変更コードにAPIキーやパスワード等の秘匿情報の直書きは確認できない。; No Silent Error Swallowing — `isCacheFresh` の `catch { return false; }` がエラーを無言で握りつぶしている。; Bounded Resource Usage — `MAX_SPECS` と `MAX_FLOW_FILES` により走査件数の上限が明示され、git呼び出し回数も実質上限付き。; No Sensitive Data in Logs — ログ出力は主にパス・失敗理由で、認証情報やPIIの出力は見当たらない。; No Disabling Existing Tests — 既存テストのスキップ化・コメントアウト・削除はなく、fixture更新と新規テスト追加のみ。; Escalate When New Tests Break Existing Tests — 新規テストが既存テストを壊した事実が提示されておらず本項は非該当。; Do Not Modify Existing Tests Without Approval — 既存fixture更新は仕様内Q&Aでユーザー承認済みと明示されている。; Flag Tests That Become Irrelevant — 既存テストが無関係化した具体例は示されておらず本項は非該当。; Exit Code Contract — 失敗時は `process.exit(1)` や `assertOk` により非ゼロ終了を返す設計になっている。; No Synchronous I/O in Hot Paths — `finalize-migration.js` で `readFileSync`/`writeFileSync` を spec 一括ループ内で使用している。; Validate User Input at Entry Point — この差分で新たなCLI引数/標準入力の受け口追加はなく、本項は実質非該当。

R1 flow finalize writes `state.finalizedAt` in spec flow.json on success — `run-finalize` calls `saveFinalizedAt(..., new Date().toISOString())`, and writer enforces UTC ISO format.; R2 metrics token uses `state.finalizedAt` instead of flow.json mtime — mtime-based date derivation was removed and rows now derive date from `parsed.state.finalizedAt`.; R3 specs missing `state.finalizedAt` are skipped with warning — build loop emits stderr warning and `continue`s without aggregating that spec.; R4 cache freshness is judged by `maxFinalizedAt` comparison — current max finalized timestamp is computed and compared with cached `maxFinalizedAt`.; R5 cache without `maxFinalizedAt` is invalidated — freshness check returns stale when cached `maxFinalizedAt` is absent/non-string, forcing rebuild.; R6 this spec finalize triggers backfill exactly once — hook runs whenever this spec’s finalize commit step runs, with no persistent one-time execution marker.; R7 backfill prefers main — branch merge timestamp with first-added fallback — script uses `git log --first-parent main` first, then falls back to `git log --diff-filter=A` on `spec.md`.; R8 existing metrics fixtures are updated in — scope for `state.finalizedAt` — existing metrics e2e fixtures were updated and finalizedAt-focused tests were added.
